tasks.label: Preview Dashboard
tasks.command: uv run python preview.py && open preview.png
tasks.detail: Render the dashboard to preview.png (mock data) and open it. Bound to Cmd+Shift+B.

tasks.label: Preview Dashboard (live data)
tasks.command: uv run python preview.py --live && open preview.png
tasks.detail: Fetch real weather/crypto/ping data, then render and open preview.png.
